name: design-system-apple
title: Apple
description: Consumer electronics. Premium white space, SF Pro, cinematic imagery.

query.en: Generate a {{artifactKind}} using the Apple design system. Stay faithful to its colour palette, typography, spacing, iconography, and component vocabulary as documented in DESIGN.md.
